column1: # Append starting from last ALPHA_ID + 1 in ALPHA_STAGING.csv

column5: Epic Games Store 0% fee on first $1M per game per year (vs 15% Apple). 12% after threshold. EGS Webshops launching for out-of-app purchases - bypasses 30% app store tax entirely
column12: Game-changing for app monetization. Web payments bypass 30% store tax. Epic spent $1B+ fighting Apple/Google.
column15: Use Epic Games Store for games OR build web payment flows to bypass app store fees. 0% on first $1M.

column5: Tim Sweeney: Revenue shifting away from gatekeepers. Flat fees tied to real services vs percentage-based revenue share. Courts may ban revenue-based app fees.
column12: Strategic insight on app monetization future. Build for web-first payments now.
column15: Position for web-to-app funnels now. Regulatory tailwinds coming.

column5: DrPufferfish Polymarket: 490 predictions - 396 wins - 80.82% win rate - $2.59M total profits. Elite prediction market trader.
column12: Polymarket systematic edge. Only 0.51% wallets profit >$1K. Domain expertise = alpha.
column15: Prediction market specialization. Domain expertise creates edge. 80%+ win rate possible.

column5: Polymarket 2025: 95M transactions - $21.5B volume - 6 strategies: info arb + cross-platform arb + high-prob bonds + LP + domain specialization + speed trading
column12: Six validated Polymarket strategies. Cross-platform arb and domain specialization most accessible.
column15: Start with domain specialization. Graduate to cross-platform arbitrage.

column5: Hormozi $100M Money Models: 2.9M copies in 9.5 hours - $87M in 24 hours - Guinness Record. Pre-launch profitable: $7M pre-sales from $4M ad spend.
column12: Book launch playbook: $4M ads -> $7M pre-sales BEFORE launch. Test hundreds of ad iterations. 20K leads/day.
column15: Book launch = lead gen. Test ad creative obsessively. Pre-launch profitable before actual launch.

column5: Acquisition.com: $250M+ annual revenue - 16 companies - Takes 20-30% equity in $3-100M ARR businesses. $35K workshops. Books 1M+ copies.
column12: Hormozi flywheel: Free content -> Books -> Workshops high-ticket -> Equity deals.
column15: Authority content -> Lead magnet books -> High-ticket workshop -> Equity deals.

column5: MrBeast reinvestment: 95-98% earnings back into content. <$1M personal despite $600-700M annual. $3-4M per video. $250M content spend 2025.
column12: Reinvestment flywheel: Higher budgets -> Better production -> More views -> Higher revenue -> Bigger budgets.
column15: Reinvest 95%+ of content revenue into better content. Quality compounds.

column5: Feastables outearned YouTube 2024: $250M sales - $20M profit. YouTube + Beast Games lost $80M. Physical product profit > content losses.
column12: Content as loss leader. Feastables profitable while content loses money. Build audience - monetize with products.
column15: YouTube = customer acquisition. Physical products = profit center.

column5: MrBeast sponsorships: $2.5-3M per brand mention. Videos generate $500K-$1M each. 400M subs - first creator to milestone.
column12: Scale = pricing power. 400M subs = $3M/mention. Production $3-4M - revenue $3-4M - profit in ancillary.
column15: At scale sponsors pay $2.5-3M/mention. Build audience first.

column5: LMG: $100-120M net worth - $4.86M/month - 120 employees - Turned down $100M buyout. Merch 55%. YouTube ads only 10%. Floatplane.
column12: Diversification: Merch 55% + Sponsors 25% + YouTube 10% + Floatplane. Build owned platforms.
column15: Merch > ads. Build owned platform (Floatplane). $100M buyout rejected.

column5: LTT breakdown: Products 55% + Sponsors ~25% + AdSense ~10% + Floatplane ~10%. YouTube ads MINORITY despite 16M+ subs.
column12: Don't build for AdSense alone. At 16M subs - ads only 10%. Merch/sponsors real money.
column15: Product-first monetization. YouTube = distribution. Merch/sponsors = revenue.

column5: MKBHD Panels FAILURE: $12/mo for wallpapers - shutdown after 15 months. 20M subs didn't convert. Saturated niche + wrong pricing.
column12: FAILURE STUDY: 20M subs can't save bad PMF. Wallpapers = commodity. $12/mo = Netflix pricing for backgrounds.
column15: Don't assume audience = customers. Pricing must match category. Subscription fatigue.

column5: MKBHD: 'If I was reviewing this app I would not be nice.' Failed price. Privacy concerns. Code open-sourced. Subs refunded.
column12: Humility: Apply same critical eye to own products. MKBHD knew bad but launched.
column15: Review own product as harshly as competitors. Don't ship what you wouldn't recommend.

column5: MKBHD: $13.9-17.3M annual - 17 employees - Brand collabs 50% + AdSense 40%. Ridge board seat + chief creative partner.
column12: Creator to business: Brand deals 50%. Board seats > one-off sponsors. Build brand = equity offers.
column15: Graduate from sponsor fees to equity deals and board seats.

column5: Hormozi launch: 'Donate 200 books' offer drove sales. Tested 100+ ad iterations. Pre-launch profitable ($7M from $4M). Then $87M day.
column12: Novel offer: 'Donate' framing turned purchase into charity. Test 100+ ads. Pre-launch profitability = confidence to scale.
column15: Creative offer framing. Test 100+ ad versions. Make pre-launch profitable.
